title: Rover - I
description: As lead developer for the BYTES club's Risk of Fail, I implemented the core gameplay loop, enemy AI using A* pathfinding, and UI functionalities. I was also tasked with designing some of the levels in the game ensuring a fair layout that promotes replayability through collectibles.

title: Risk of Fail
description: As lead developer for the BYTES club's Risk of Fail, I implemented the core gameplay loop, enemy AI using A* pathfinding, and UI functionalities. I was also tasked with designing some of the levels in the game ensuring a fair layout that promotes replayability through collectibles.

title: Dreams of the past.
description: With the theme 'Only 2 Colors,' I helped develop a system for dynamically changing rooms around the player while being pursued by an AI. I also designed the UI, color grading, and room layouts, and modeled props in Blender to enhance the game’s atmosphere.

title: Xtreme Neo Combat
description: For the game jam themed 'Evolve,' I implemented systems to scale enemy frequency and toughness dynamically and designed a rogue-lite progression system for Xtreme Neo Combat.

title: Clinic Management System
description: A Clinic Management System designed for a small clinic to efficiently manage patients, appointments, staff shifts, and medical inventory. Built with React, Flask, and SQLite3, it integrates key data tables to streamline clinic operations and ensure organized, accessible records for improved workflow.

title: Portfolio Website
description: Made in accordance for my finals for my computing class, will also be used as a portfolio website.

title: Attendance Tracker
description: Worked together with a team to design, conceptualize, and develop a new front-end interface for their employee attendance tracker website based on the aesthetics and brand of the company.
